title: Goal change log entry — one event per implemented recommendation
description: Append-only record of each implementation an agent has shipped, the goal(s) it was meant to advance, and the metric movement that resulted. Stored at agents/<agent-id>/goals/changes.jsonl. Each new run reads this back as context so the agent can shift its recommendations based on what's actually working.

ts.description: When this change was recorded (ISO 8601 UTC).

goal_ids.description: Which agent goals this change was meant to advance. A single rec can advance multiple goals.

site.description: Site this change applies to (when the agent is per-site).

rec_check_id.description: For LLM-audit recs: the SEO_AUDIT_CHECKLIST check_id (e.g. meta-title-length, schema-product-missing). Lets the agent pattern-match across runs.

implementer_agent.description: Agent that actually applied the change (e.g. seo-implementer).

metric_before.description: Snapshot of the affected goal's metric value at change-time.

metric_after.description: Filled in after follow-up runs measure the goal again. May be missing on a fresh entry.

horizon_runs.description: How many runs after the change this measurement is from.

outcome_summary.description: Human-readable single-sentence summary of what shipped + what happened. Filled by the agent's next-run analysis.

user_feedback.description: Optional free-text the user attached when accepting the rec via email reply.
